disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Irish firm launches rapid hantavirus antibody kits after deadly cruise ship outbreak - Irish Independent
updates.body_en: Irish firm launches rapid hantavirus antibody kits after deadly cruise ship outbreak Irish Independent
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰公司推出快速汉坦病毒抗体检测试剂盒。

updates.title_en: WHO chief: Cruise ship hantavirus outbreak 'stable for now' - upi.com
updates.body_en: WHO chief: Cruise ship hantavirus outbreak 'stable for now' upi.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮汉坦病毒疫情目前稳定。

updates.title_en: Third hantavirus case confirmed in Taiwan this year - Outbreak News Today
updates.body_en: Third hantavirus case confirmed in Taiwan this year Outbreak News Today
updates.summary_zh: 台湾今年确诊第三例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: WHO chief says hantavirus ‘situation is stable for now’ - The Hill
updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus ‘situation is stable for now’ The Hill
updates.summary_zh: WHO 总干事称汉坦病毒局势目前稳定。

updates.title_en: The race to identify hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away - The Independent
updates.body_en: The race to identify hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮上数千英里外识别汉坦病毒的竞赛。

updates.title_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 海军派医生前往偏远岛屿治疗鼠病毒患者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus is gaining ground in the US, startling researchers: ‘Widespread and complex virus’ - New York Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus is gaining ground in the US, startling researchers: ‘Widespread and complex virus’ New York Post
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒在美国蔓延，研究人员震惊。

updates.title_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak - Daily Monitor
updates.body_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak Daily Monitor
updates.summary_zh: 非洲实验室帮助破解汉坦病毒爆发。

updates.title_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 南非科学家24小时内识别汉坦病毒爆发。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: WHO says outbreak is stabilizing as the Netherlands reports new case and ship captain disembarks - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: WHO says outbreak is stabilizing as the Netherlands reports new case and ship captain disembarks Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: WHO称疫情趋稳，荷兰报告新病例，船长下船。

updates.title_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away - AP News
updates.body_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away AP News
updates.summary_zh: 南非科学家识别出数千英里外邮轮上的汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: How scientists cracked a rare hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship far from shore - Telangana Today
updates.body_en: How scientists cracked a rare hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship far from shore Telangana Today
updates.summary_zh: 科学家破解与远海邮轮相关的罕见汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 维多利亚市三名与汉坦病毒疫情相关者仍在住院。
